same_day_appointments.notes: A limited number of additional appointments are released at most offices daily and made available throughout the day; these can be scheduled online.

exceptions: business needs (parental authorization, residency/address change, etc.)

faq_operational_rules.no_appointment_option: If arriving without an appointment, customer may use a self-service kiosk to schedule if available that day, or schedule another day/location.
faq_operational_rules.reschedule_process: Reschedule via scheduler; existing appointment is automatically cancelled upon confirmation of a new appointment.
faq_operational_rules.confirmation_process: Provided at booking; can be obtained later by logging back into scheduler.

notifications.recommendation: Adding a valid email is best for receiving pertinent information.

faq_operational_rules.no_local_office_listed_reason: If local office is not listed, there are no available appointments; select next closest office.
faq_operational_rules.online_eligibility_check: Scheduler may advise if eligible to complete service online via Texas.gov.
